quotes:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Maintain strict, authorized hierarchy of brand colors across all communications.
rules.rule_text: The three approved brand colors must follow the hierarchical order: (1) #00529B (Deep Blue) as dominant, (2) #FAA31B (Amber Orange) as the secondary accent, and (3) #FFC60A (Golden Yellow) as the tertiary accent.

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Maintain typographic consistency using approved brand typefaces.
rules.rule_text: Use Agenda (font.family.agenda) as the primary headline font for all headers/headlines, and Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans) for body copy.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0 25C0 11.1929 11.1929 0 25 0H177.5C178.605 0 179.5 0.895431 179.5 2V33.5C179.5 47.3071 168.307 58.5 154.5 58.5H2C0.895433 58.5 0 57.6046 0 56.5V25Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_75_5202)"/> <defs> <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_75_5202" x1="0" y1="29.25" x2="179.5" y2="29.25" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"> <stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/> </linearGradient> </defs> </svg>

rules.intent: Apply the exact signature asymmetric button shape and yellow-orange gradient for brand call-to-actions.
rules.rule_text: CTAs must use the specific asymmetrical rounded-corner button shape and vector linear gradient starting from SVG Yellow (#FFDF55) to SVG Orange (#FAA21B).
